# .github/copilot-instructions.md

- [x] Project requirements clarified: React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, Google Fonts, Material Symbols, no UI breaks, match PolicyCures HTML.
- [x] Project scaffolded using Vite React template in-place (no folder break).
- [ ] Customize the project: migrate HTML structure into React components, integrate Tailwind, fonts, and icons, and ensure pixel-perfect UI.
- [ ] Install required extensions (none specified by setup info).
- [ ] Compile and test the project for UI integrity.
- [ ] Create and run tasks if needed.
- [ ] Launch the project (dev server).
- [ ] Ensure documentation is complete and up to date.

Progress will be updated as each step is completed.
